destinations.name: Dahab
destinations.note: Announced on homepage destination chooser but has no category/tour/sitemap entries yet.

headings: Discover, Explore, and Live the Magic of Egypt's Red Sea Paradise
body.companyDescriptionVerbatim:
At Sharm Gate, we make it easy to design your dream getaway. Whether you're chasing adrenaline rushes, serene seaside moments, or cultural treasures, Sharm El Sheikh—The City of Peace—offers something unforgettable for every kind of traveler.

Our Story

Founded with a passion for showcasing the beauty of Sharm El Sheikh, Sharm Gate has grown from a small local tour operator to one of the most trusted travel partners in the Red Sea region.

Our mission is simple: to create unforgettable experiences that connect travelers with the magic of Egypt's underwater paradise, rich history, and vibrant culture.

whyChooseUs.title: Expert Local Guides
whyChooseUs.text: Our certified guides bring years of local expertise and passion to every tour, ensuring authentic experiences.

whyChooseUs.title: Best Price Guarantee
whyChooseUs.text: We offer competitive prices without compromising on quality. Find a lower price? We'll match it.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Customer Support
whyChooseUs.text: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist you before, during, and after your trip.

contactForm.intro: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

body.notes: The 'Our Journey in Numbers' stats all render as placeholder '0+' (likely counters not animated/populated server-side). Contact form renders server-side. Company copy is generic and shared across destinations.

body.intro: At Sharm Gate, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services.

informationWeCollect: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and nationality
Booking Information: Travel dates, number of travelers, tour preferences, and special requirements
Payment Information: Payment card details and billing address (processed securely through PayPal)
Account Information: Username, password, and profile preferences
Communication Data: Messages, inquiries, and feedback you send to us
howWeUseYourInformation: Process and manage your tour bookings and reservations
Send booking confirmations, tickets, and travel updates
Provide customer support and respond to your inquiries
Send promotional offers and newsletters (with your consent)
Improve our services and user experience
Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud
informationSharing: Tour Operators & Suppliers: To fulfill your bookings and provide services
Payment Processors: PayPal for secure payment processing
Service Providers: Companies that help us operate our platform
Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights
Note: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
thirdPartyServices: Firebase: For authentication and data storage
Social Media Platforms: For sharing and login features
yourRights: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request deletion of your personal data
Lodge a complaint with a data protection authority
sections.childrensPrivacy: Our services are not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

contact.address: Sharm El Sheikh, South Sinai, Egypt

body.notes: Full legal content renders server-side. Confirms tech stack: PayPal (payments), Firebase (auth/data), Google Analytics.

seo.title: Sharm Gate - Choose Your Destination | Sharm Gate
seo.metaDescription: Discover the best tours and activities in Egypt. Choose your city: Sharm El Sheikh, Hurghada, or Dahab.

body.notes: Root /en is a destination picker (no global header/footer). Lists three destinations including Dahab, which is referenced in SEO copy as a city.

login.result: Page loads server-side with global header/footer but the login FORM is NOT present in the server HTML — no email/password fields render. No redirect occurs (HTTP 200, stays on /en/login). The form is client-rendered (likely Firebase auth). No automated login attempted.

signup.result: Page loads server-side and DOES render a registration form. Heading 'Create Account', subtext 'Sign up to start booking amazing experiences'. Fields: Full Name, Email Address, Phone Number, Password, Confirm Password. Submit button 'Create Account'. Footer link 'Already have an account? Sign In' -> /en/login. No redirect. No automated signup attempted.
